zh.Rockbeare, Devon, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭戴文洛可亞雷
zh.lifeSummary: John Radford I是John Radford的兒子，於1510年出生在英國英格蘭戴文洛可亞雷。他於1537年與Margaret Raleigh在英國戴文洛可亞雷結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1575年10月4日在英國倫敦享年65歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.Rockbeare, Devon, England, United Kingdo: 英国英格兰戴文洛可亞雷
zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Radford I是John Radford的儿子，于1510年出生在英国英格兰戴文洛可亞雷。他于1537年与Margaret Raleigh在英国戴文洛可亞雷结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1575年10月4日在英国倫敦享年65岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Radford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Radford (Devon, Nottinghamshire, Oxfordshire, Somerset, Warwickshire, Worcestershire), Raddiford (Devon), Ratford (Sussex, Wiltshire), Redford (Angus, Fife, Midlothian, Dorset, Sussex), Retford (Nottinghamshire), Rodford (Gloucestershire), or Rudford (Gloucestershire). Most of these placenames appear to derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + ford ‘ford’, though some are likely to derive from Old English hrēod ‘reed’ + ford (e.g. Rodford and Rudford (Gloucestershire)), and the Oxfordshire placename may derive from Old English rād ‘riding’ + ford, probably meaning ‘ford which can be crossed on horseback’. This English name has been established in Ireland (Wexford) since the 16th century.

variants.name: Redifer
meanings: Possibly English: variant of Reddiford, itself a variant of Radford .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: John Radford I was born in 1510, in Rockbeare, Devon, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Radford. He married Margaret Raleigh in 1537, in Rockbeare, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 4 October 1575, in London, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Radford I est né en 1510, à Rockbeare, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Radford. Il a épousé Margaret Raleigh en 1537, à Rockbeare, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1575, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John Radford I wurde 1510 in Rockbeare, Devon, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John Radford geboren. Er hat 1537 in Rockbeare, Devon, England Margaret Raleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1575 im Alter von 65 Jahren in London, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Radford I è nato il nel 1510 nel Rockbeare, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John Radford. Lui sposato Margaret Raleigh nel 1537, nel Rockbeare, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 4 ottobre 1575, nel London, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Radford Iは1510年にイギリスイギリスデボンロクベアアでJohn Radfordの息子として生まれた。1537年にイギリスデボンロクベアアでMargaret Raleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1575年10月4日にイギリスロンドンで65歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Radford I(은)는 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 록브이르에서 John Radford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1537년 영국 데폰 록브이르에서 Margaret Raleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1575년 10월 4일 영국 런던에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Radford I nasceu em 1510, em Rockbeare, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John Radford. Ele casou-se com Margaret Raleigh em 1537, em Rockbeare, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1575, em London, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Radford I родился в 1510 г. в местности роккбир, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали John Radford. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Raleigh в 1537 г. в местности роккбир, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 4 октября 1575 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John Radford I nació en 1510, en Rockbeare, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John Radford. Se casó con Margaret Raleigh en 1537, en Rockbeare, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1575, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
